title: ricinocarpus brachyandrus
intro: Ricinocarpus brachyandrus, also known as the "short-stalked Ricinocarpus," is a plant species in the family Celastraceae. The medicinal properties of Ricinocarpus brachyandrus are attributed to its root, which is used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestive health. Ricinocarpus brachyandrus is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
